mapper.select: SELECT c.title, c.type, d.name AS typeName, s.name AS creatorName, c.payee_name AS payeeName, c.account, c.amount, c.info, c.verify_state AS verifyState, CASE c.verify_state WHEN 0 THEN '待审核' WHEN 1 THEN '审核通过' WHEN 2 THEN '已驳回' ELSE '未知' END AS verifyStateName, vs.name AS verifyStaff, c.verify_time AS verifyTime, c.verify_remark AS verifyRemark, c.add_time AS applyTime, c.attach_file AS attachFile FROM cashout c LEFT JOIN staff s ON c.creator = s.id AND s.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN staff vs ON c.verify_staff = vs.id AND vs.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN dict_item d ON c.type = d.id WHERE c.id = #{id} AND c.deleted = 0
